sources.title: TCGA-BRCA / GDC publication freeze
sources.primary_use: Breast multi-omics benchmark for mutation, copy number, RNA, subtype labels, and clinical cross-checks.
sources.access: open processed data; controlled raw data
sources.verifier: Check access level, file size or checksum, TCGA barcode format, sample counts, and source freeze.

sources.title: cBioPortal Breast Invasive Carcinoma PanCancer Atlas
sources.primary_use: Fast mutation, CNA, clinical, and sample-list cross-checks.
sources.verifier: API smoke test must return expected study metadata and sample count before downstream use.

sources.title: UCSC Xena TCGA-BRCA matrices
sources.primary_use: Fast processed expression and phenotype matrix access.
sources.verifier: Verify hub, dataset ID, dimensions, and sample ID intersection with TCGA/cBioPortal.

sources.title: 560 breast cancer whole-genome sequencing cohort
sources.primary_use: HRD mutational-signature and WGS positive-control backbone.
sources.verifier: Freeze a small panel and verify labels against publication or public repository metadata.

sources.title: METABRIC / Synapse
sources.primary_use: Independent breast expression and CNV validation.
sources.access: registered or controlled depending on file
sources.verifier: Record access state; do not assume data is fetchable without registered access.

sources.title: CPTAC Breast via GDC/PDC
sources.verifier: Confirm breast project, file access level, and data type before adding to runnable benchmark.

sources.title: Hartwig Medical Database
sources.primary_use: Metastatic tumor-normal WGS/RNA validation and HMF tool ecosystem context.
sources.verifier: Record access-request state; do not put Hartwig in the phase-1 runnable source list.

sources.title: DepMap / CCLE
sources.primary_use: TNBC cell-line technical controls for RNA and marker sanity checks.
sources.verifier: Verify lineage filter, matrix dimensions, and known TNBC marker behavior.

sources.title: SEQC2/HCC1395 raw tumor-normal SRA benchmark
sources.primary_use: Representative raw FASTQ/SRA tumor-normal breast/TNBC benchmark before Diana FASTQ/BAM/CRAM files arrive.
sources.access: open SRA runs; full WGS is large
expected_artifacts: FASTQ conversion and QC smoke outputs
sources.verifier: Refresh raw representative panel metadata, confirm public tumor and normal roles for each pair, then run a downsampled or regional FASTQ smoke test before full WGS.

sources.title: SEQC2/HCC1395 reference materials FTP
sources.primary_use: Benchmark/truth-set materials for HCC1395 somatic variant comparison after raw-data smoke tests work.
sources.verifier: Record exact truth-set file/version and genome build before comparing any caller output.

sources.title: UCSC hg38/hg19 per-chromosome FASTA references
sources.primary_use: Partial real-human-reference validation for GRCh38/hg38 and GRCh37/hg19 alignment handling before full reference bundles are configured.
sources.verifier: Download chr13/chr17 for hg38 and hg19, validate md5 values, index FASTA/BWA references, align HCC1395 tumor-normal FASTQ subset, and verify BAM contracts across both builds.

sources.title: nf-core/sarek
sources.primary_use: Tumor-normal WGS/WES raw-data workflow for variant calling and annotation.
sources.verifier: Run profile test or a tiny fixture before any real raw sample analysis.

sources.title: CHORD
sources.primary_use: HRD classifier from somatic mutation contexts, including BRCA1-like versus BRCA2-like evidence when inputs support it.
sources.access: open source R package; migrated to HMF tools ecosystem
sources.verifier: Require PASS somatic variants, supported SV parsing, reference-genome label, and positive-control recovery.

sources.title: scarHRD
sources.primary_use: Copy-number scar score from WES/WGS-derived segments.
sources.verifier: Reproduce a known fixture in containerized R before interpreting scores.

sources.title: SigProfilerAssignment
sources.primary_use: Known mutational-signature assignment including SBS3-like signal.
sources.verifier: Record genome build, matrix type, mutation counts, and reconstruction metrics for every sample.

sources.title: HRDetect paper
sources.primary_use: Integrated mutational-signature HRD detection frame for breast cancer.
sources.verifier: Do not collapse HRDetect-style evidence into a single clinical claim unless all required input classes exist.
